name: gateway_cost_report
description: Return current session and API-key spend. Includes total cost, call count, and breakdown by backend and tool. Per-key totals are shown for 24 h / 7 d / 30 d rolling windows.

include_all_keys.description: Return all API key accumulators (admin view). Default false.

include_all_sessions.description: Return all active sessions (admin view). Default false.

session_id.description: Specific session ID to report on. Defaults to current session.
